TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Andrew Bogut == Andrew Bogut hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 11, Andrew Bogut, squliq na p'unro. mintzyuwaw nya 1970 kawas hiya yaba ru yaya nya aring Croatia musa maki Australia. Bogut aring mrkyas smoya balay mzyuwi mari musa sakang' pspung mari. Jessica ga Bogut nya,maki sazing mlikuy laqi nya Luka ru Nikola. pinqbaqan nya Andrew Bogut mqwas biru sa St John's Regional pqwsan biru seneng . Andrew Bogut mqwas biru sa Lake Ginninderra pqwsan biru seneng . Andrew Bogut, t'aring kawas tay 2003 tehuk kawas tay 2005, mqwas biru sa Utah pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya Andrew Bogut maki msqun ki Jessica, tehuk misuw qani. maki 2 la'iy. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players 1984 kawas htagan beh sa Bogut ga,maki mongab'un.
S.PHON: == an*rew βoɣut == an*rew βoɣut ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, an*rew βoɣut, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. mintzjuwaw nja **** kawas~ɕ ħija jaβa ru jaja nja ariŋ ʦ~ʨroatia mus~ɕa maki aus~ɕtralia. βoɣut ariŋ mrkjas~ɕ s~ɕmoja βalaj mzjuwi mari mus~ɕa s~ɕakaŋʔ ps~ɕpuŋ mari. *es~ɕs~ɕiʦ~ʨa ɣa βoɣut nja,maki s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj laqi nja luka ru nikola. pinqβaqan nja an*rew βoɣut mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa s~ɕt *oħnʔs~ɕ reɣional pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ . an*rew βoɣut mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa lake ɣinnin*erra pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ . an*rew βoɣut, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa utaħ pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. qnxan nja an*rew βoɣut maki ms~ɕqun ki *es~ɕs~ɕiʦ~ʨa, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. maki * laʔij. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ **** kawas~ɕ ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa βoɣut ɣa,maki moŋaβʔun.
S.FORM: == Andrew Bogut == Andrew Bogut hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 11, Andrew Bogut, squliq na p'unro. mintzyuwaw nya 1970 kawas hiya yaba ru yaya nya aring Croatia musa maki Australia. Bogut aring mrkyas smoya balay mzyuwi mari musa sakang' pspung mari. Jessica ga Bogut nya,maki sazing mlikuy laqi nya Luka ru Nikola. pinqbaqan nya Andrew Bogut mqwas biru sa St John's Regional pqwsan biru seneng . Andrew Bogut mqwas biru sa Lake Ginninderra pqwsan biru seneng . Andrew Bogut, t'aring kawas tay 2003 tehuk kawas tay 2005, mqwas biru sa Utah pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya Andrew Bogut maki msqun ki Jessica, tehuk misuw qani. maki 2 la'iy. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players 1984 kawas htagan beh sa Bogut ga,maki mongab'un.
S.PHON: == an*rew βoɣut == an*rew βoɣut ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, an*rew βoɣut, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. mintzjuwaw nja **** kawas~ɕ ħija jaβa ru jaja nja ariŋ ʦ~ʨroatia mus~ɕa maki aus~ɕtralia. βoɣut ariŋ mrkjas~ɕ s~ɕmoja βalaj mzjuwi mari mus~ɕa s~ɕakaŋʔ ps~ɕpuŋ mari. *es~ɕs~ɕiʦ~ʨa ɣa βoɣut nja,maki s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj laqi nja luka ru nikola. pinqβaqan nja an*rew βoɣut mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa s~ɕt *oħnʔs~ɕ reɣional pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ . an*rew βoɣut mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa lake ɣinnin*erra pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ . an*rew βoɣut, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa utaħ pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. qnxan nja an*rew βoɣut maki ms~ɕqun ki *es~ɕs~ɕiʦ~ʨa, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. maki * laʔij. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ **** kawas~ɕ ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa βoɣut ɣa,maki moŋaβʔun.
